title: Payment summaries
description: How to complete the Payment summaries section in myTax.

content_blocks.text: We may have pre-filled your return with payment summary information provided to us, for example, by employers and Australian government agencies.
If you received any of the following employment-type income or taxable Australian Government payments and they are not already pre-filled, you must add them in the Payment Summaries section.
Follow the links below to see more information to help you select your payment summary type:
Do not include amounts that you do not pay tax on .

content_text:
We may have pre-filled your return with payment summary information provided to us, for example, by employers and Australian government agencies.
If you received any of the following employment-type income or taxable Australian Government payments and they are not already pre-filled, you must add them in the Payment Summaries section.
Follow the links below to see more information to help you select your payment summary type:
- Salary or wages
- Australian Government allowances and payments
- Australian Government pensions and allowances
## Amounts not included
Do not include amounts that you do not pay tax on .
